summary: Integrated ADR 0273 on synchronized main release 0.177.76 by replaying exact-main public endpoint admission control across the shared edge and route-ledger publication paths, re-verifying direct HTTP and TLS evidence, and establishing platform version 0.130.52 without introducing new public DNS or certificate drift.

verification.check: Latest origin/main baseline and protected release cut
verification.observed: `git fetch origin --prune` confirmed the synchronized mainline baseline at commit `2da64d1c36ebca0f1aea4a0e3c65f762d0da2ae1`; the rebased exact-main ADR 0273 replay source was commit `ca87632b5f459bc471c2405af3a8c691e5132b78` on top of that merged head, preserving the protected release cut from repository version `0.177.75` to `0.177.76` while carrying platform version `0.130.52` for this public-endpoint admission rollout.

`uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_subdomain_exposure_audit.py tests/test_edge_publication_makefile.py tests/test_validate_repo_cache.py -q` returned `35 passed`; `./scripts/validate_repo.sh data-models agent-standards generated-docs generated-portals` passed; and the dependency-graph generator check `uv run --with jsonschema --with pyyaml python scripts/validate_dependency_graph.py >/dev/null && uv run --with jsonschema python scripts/generate_dependency_diagram.py --check >/dev/null && uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/generate_diagrams.py --check >/dev/null` returned `OK` on the integrated latest-main tree.

After rebasing the validated ADR 0273 release tree onto `2da64d1c36ebca0f1aea4a0e3c65f762d0da2ae1`, `make route-dns-assertion-ledger env=production` completed successfully with final recap `localhost : ok=56 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=24 rescued=0 ignored=0`, proving the new admission gate keeps the already-aligned public DNS state idempotent on the latest main release.

After rebasing the validated ADR 0273 release tree onto `2da64d1c36ebca0f1aea4a0e3c65f762d0da2ae1`, `make configure-edge-publication env=production` completed successfully with final recap `nginx-lv3 : ok=61 changed=3 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=14 rescued=0 ignored=0`; the exact-main run rebuilt the docs and changelog portals, published the generated static directories, revalidated the shared-edge certificate inputs, and completed all HTTP and HTTPS probe checks before finishing.

`curl -I https://lv3.org` returned `HTTP/2 308` redirecting to `https://nginx.lv3.org/`; `curl -I https://docs.lv3.org` and `curl -I https://ops.lv3.org` both returned `HTTP/2 302` to their `oauth2/sign_in` paths with `x-robots-tag: noindex, nofollow`; and `echo | openssl s_client -servername docs.lv3.org -connect docs.lv3.org:443 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -issuer -subject -text` showed a Let's Encrypt issuer (`CN=E7`), subject `CN=nginx.lv3.org`, and SAN coverage for `agents.lv3.org`, `api.lv3.org`, `apps.lv3.org`, `changelog.lv3.org`, `coolify.lv3.org`, `docs.lv3.org`, `draw.lv3.org`, `headscale.lv3.org`, `home.lv3.org`, `langfuse.lv3.org`, `logs.lv3.org`, `lv3.org`, `n8n.lv3.org`, `nginx.lv3.org`, `ops.lv3.org`, `realtime.lv3.org`, `registry.lv3.org`, `status.lv3.org`, `tasks.lv3.org`, and `wiki.lv3.org`.

`make subdomain-exposure-audit` wrote audit run `0f4855aa-095d-434d-887b-2f8343e0716c` at `2026-03-29T12:28:10.484477Z` into `receipts/subdomain-exposure-audit/20260329T122810Z.json`; the ADR 0273 concordance checks passed on the rebased latest-main tree, while the audit still reported only the pre-existing `git.lv3.org` warnings `active_subdomain_missing_expected_public_resolution` and `active_catalog_subdomain_missing_from_zone`.

notes: This receipt supersedes the earlier branch-local receipt `2026-03-29-adr-0273-public-endpoint-admission-control-live-apply` as the canonical source for the merged mainline state because it records the synchronized replay from the protected release cut on top of the newest available origin/main baseline.

After origin/main advanced to `2da64d1c36ebca0f1aea4a0e3c65f762d0da2ae1`, the exact-main route-ledger and shared-edge replays were rerun from the rebased `0.177.76` tree and the final audit proof was refreshed at `receipts/subdomain-exposure-audit/20260329T122810Z.json`.

The route-ledger replay remained fully idempotent on the integrated tree, while the shared-edge replay made three safe changes on `nginx-lv3` while re-publishing the generated docs and changelog portals for release 0.177.76.

The live platform already satisfied ADR 0273's public-hostname and certificate concordance contract before this exact-main replay; platform version 0.130.52 records the synchronized mainline verification of that contract together with the protected release surfaces.
